title: Luigite - Need For Speed
description: Adds Luigite, an edible gem with speed capabilities, to Minecraft.
body:
![The logo for Luigite - Need For Speed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899cd33713d880f968ff48b7d3a108e5df038e92.png)

Luigite - Need For Speed adds a new gemstone to Minecraft with special speed-enhancing properties. Mine for rare Luigite ore, craft powerful items, and trade with villagers to harness the speed-boosting effects of this mysterious new material.

This lightweight mod integrates seamlessly with vanilla Minecraft, adding new content that feels natural to the game while expanding gameplay options for miners and explorers.

## 📥 Installation Guide

Luigite - Need For Speed is designed for Fabric 1.21.4. Install Fabric Loader from the [Fabric website](https://fabricmc.net/use/), then place both the Fabric API and Luigite Mod into your *mods folder*.

This mod must be installed on both client and server. Since it adds new blocks, items, and world generation, both sides need the mod for proper functionality.

**Not sure if you installed the mod correctly?** Look for Luigite Ore while mining between Y=-16 and Y=112, with higher concentrations in the middle ranges. You should also find Cleric villagers offering Luigite Gems and Luigite Apples as trades.

## ⬆️ Important Update

Luigite - Need For Speed is now available for NeoForege 1.21.4! Install NeoForge from the [NeoForged website](https://neoforged.net/#using-neoforge-for-mod-development) and start playing!

## ✨ Features

### Blocks and Items
- **Luigite Ore** - Generates throughout the overworld with similar rarity to copper
- **Deepslate Luigite Ore** - Find this variant in the deeper parts of your world
- **Luigite Gems** - The core item of the mod, provides a brief Speed II effect when consumed
- **Luigite Block** - A beautiful storage block crafted from 9 gems, works as a beacon base!
- **Luigite Apple** - Grants Speed II effect for 9x longer than the gems, perfect for exploration or escape
- **Totem of Speed** - Grants Speed II effect if the item is held in the player's offhand

### Trading & Villager Integration
- **Cleric Trades** - Apprentice and Journeyman Clerics offer Luigite items for emeralds
- **Balanced Economy** - Fair prices that integrate well with vanilla trading systems
 
## 🐛 How to Report Issues

Please use the issue tracker on our [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Luigichopper/luigite-1.21.4/issues) to report any bugs, crashes, or suggestions. Include information about:
- Your Minecraft and Fabric version
- Other mods you're using
- Any crash reports or logs you have
